place: Plai Laem, Bo Phut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani 84320, Thailand
title: Boutique Four-Bedroom Pool Villas in a Gated Plai Laem Community
blurb: A boutique gated development of just eight modern tropical pool villas near the north-eastern tip of Koh Samui, a short stroll from Choeng Mon Beach and minutes from the airport, restaurants and Fisherman's Village. Each four-bedroom villa offers around 270 m² of built-up space, a private swimming pool, a landscaped garden and private parking, within a peaceful, low-density community. Sold freehold or leasehold on a Chanote title, from ฿13,900,000 with a construction milestone payment plan.
detail:
Set in one of Koh Samui's most desirable residential pockets on the Plai Laem headland, this is a boutique development of only eight modern tropical pool villas — a deliberately low-density, gated community built for privacy and calm. The location is the draw: Choeng Mon Beach is a one-kilometre, twelve-minute walk away, the villas sit directly opposite the Samui Padel courts, and the airport, Big Buddha, Bangrak Pier, Fisherman's Village and Chaweng are all within a short drive.

Each villa is a spacious, family-friendly four-bedroom home with four bathrooms across approximately 270 m² of built-up area. Contemporary interiors pair an open-plan living and dining space with a fitted kitchen, comfortable bedrooms and a dedicated laundry room, opening out to a private swimming pool framed by a landscaped garden and served by private parking.

The design suits equally a full-time residence, a holiday home or a rental investment, with generous proportions and a quiet setting that hold their appeal year-round. Only eight villas are offered, so the community stays intimate and uncrowded.

Every villa is sold on a Chanote title with freehold and leasehold ownership both available — the leasehold can be converted to freehold should the law change or on a change of ownership — priced from ฿13,900,000 and not including a furniture package. Purchases follow a construction milestone payment plan, with instalments tied to build progress through to handover.
